Neksus JobSpec (neksus-jobspec)

Purpose
- Local-first CLI and Python package for creating, validating, inspecting, and rendering structured JobSpec YAML files.

Install
- pip install neksus-jobspec

Core CLI Commands
- neksus-jobspec version
- neksus-jobspec init
- neksus-jobspec spec new <name>
- neksus-jobspec spec validate <path>
- neksus-jobspec spec render <path> --format markdown|html|json
- neksus-jobspec check

Public Python API
- from neksus_jobspec import JobSpec, load_jobspec, validate_jobspec, render_jobspec

v0.2.0 Composition Model
- Job-detail pages can be composed from controlled, typed components.
- Assistants should use documented `components` types and variants only.
- Assistants should not invent new component types or variants.
- Validate before render.
- Prefer JSON render output for automation.

Security and boundaries
- Custom CSS is supported.
- JS config is trusted/local-only output configuration.
- Inline JS must not be emitted unless explicitly enabled.
- Rendering produces output only and does not execute scripts.
- Hosted API: planned, not implemented.
- MCP server: planned, not implemented.

Documentation
- README.md
- CHANGELOG.md
- docs/specification.md
- docs/rendering.md
- docs/python-api.md
- docs/api-reference.md
- docs/versioning.md
